# flashblade_certificate_group (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade certificate group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_certificate_group" "example" {
  name = "my-ca-bundle"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the certificate group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the certificate group.
- `realms` (List of String) The list of realms associated with this certificate group.
